mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recommendations (`쉼표번호`, diagnosis_result_id, place_id, criteria, clicked, saved, recommended_at) VALUES (#{쉼표번호}, #{diagnosisResultId}, #{placeId}, #{criteria}, #{clicked}, #{saved}, #{recommendedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.`쉼표번호`, r.diagnosis_result_id, r.place_id, r.criteria, r.clicked, r.saved, r.recommended_at, p.name AS place_name, p.address AS place_address, p.latitude AS place_latitude, p.longitude AS place_longitude, (SELECT photo_url FROM place_photos WHERE place_id = p.id LIMIT 1) AS place_photo_url, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM place_reviews WHERE place_id = p.id) AS place_review_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM place_bookmarks WHERE place_id = p.id) AS place_bookmark_count, (SELECT rest_type FROM place_tags WHERE place_id = p.id LIMIT 1) AS place_first_rest_type FROM recommendations r LEFT JOIN places p ON r.place_id = p.id WHERE r.`쉼표번호` = #{쉼표번호} ORDER BY r.recommended_at DESC LIMIT 9
mapper.update: UPDATE recommendations SET clicked = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE recommendations SET saved = #{saved} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.`쉼표번호`, r.diagnosis_result_id, r.place_id, r.criteria, r.clicked, r.saved, r.recommended_at, p.name AS place_name, p.address AS place_address, p.latitude AS place_latitude, p.longitude AS place_longitude FROM recommendations r LEFT JOIN places p ON r.place_id = p.id WHERE r.`쉼표번호` = #{쉼표번호} ORDER BY r.recommended_at DESC
